feature: Build a REST API with JWT authentication, user CRUD operations, and comprehensive tests

tasks.title: Database Schema & Models
tasks.description: Define SQLAlchemy models for User, Session, and related tables
tasks.prompt:
Create a Python module with SQLAlchemy models for a user management system.

Models needed:
- User: id, email, username, hashed_password, created_at, updated_at, is_active
- Session: id, user_id (FK), token, expires_at, created_at

Include:
- Base model class with common fields
- Proper relationships between models
- Index definitions for frequently queried fields
- Pydantic schemas for request/response serialization

Output a single Python file with all models and schemas.
tasks.system_prompt: You are a database engineer specializing in SQLAlchemy ORM design. Write production-ready models with proper types, constraints, and relationships.

tasks.title: JWT Authentication Module
tasks.description: Implement JWT token creation, validation, and refresh logic
tasks.prompt:
Create a Python module implementing JWT authentication.

Functions needed:
- create_access_token(user_id, email) -> str
- create_refresh_token(user_id) -> str
- verify_token(token) -> dict (payload)
- refresh_access_token(refresh_token) -> str
- hash_password(password) -> str
- verify_password(password, hashed) -> bool

Use PyJWT for token operations and bcrypt for password hashing.
Include proper expiration handling, token type validation, and error classes.

Output a single Python file.
tasks.system_prompt: You are a security engineer specializing in authentication systems. Write secure, production-ready authentication code.

tasks.title: API Configuration & Error Handling
tasks.description: Set up FastAPI app config, middleware, and standardized error handling
tasks.prompt:
Create a Python module with FastAPI application setup.

Include:
- App factory function with CORS, logging, and exception handlers
- Standardized error response format: {"error": {"code": str, "message": str, "details": dict}}
- Custom exception classes: NotFoundError, ValidationError, AuthenticationError, AuthorizationError
- Request logging middleware
- Health check endpoint
- Configuration class loading from environment variables

Output a single Python file.
tasks.system_prompt: You are a backend engineer specializing in FastAPI application architecture. Write clean, well-structured application setup code.

tasks.title: User CRUD Endpoints
tasks.description: Implement all user management API endpoints
tasks.prompt:
Create a FastAPI router with user CRUD endpoints.

Context from dependencies:
[task_001]: {database models with User, Session, and Pydantic schemas}
[task_002]: {JWT auth functions: create_access_token, verify_token, hash_password, verify_password}
[task_003]: {Error classes: NotFoundError, ValidationError, AuthenticationError}

Endpoints needed:
- POST /auth/register - Create new user
- POST /auth/login - Authenticate and return tokens
- POST /auth/refresh - Refresh access token
- GET /users/me - Get current user profile
- PUT /users/me - Update current user
- DELETE /users/me - Deactivate current user
- GET /users/{id} - Get user by ID (admin only)
- GET /users - List users with pagination (admin only)

Include proper request validation, authentication dependency, and error handling.
Output a single Python file with the router.
tasks.system_prompt: You are a backend engineer. Use the provided models and auth module. Follow REST conventions strictly.

tasks.title: Authentication Middleware
tasks.description: Implement FastAPI dependency for JWT-based route protection
tasks.prompt:
Create a FastAPI dependency module for authentication.

Context from dependencies:
[task_002]: {JWT functions: verify_token, TokenError}
[task_001]: {User model and UserSchema}

Implement:
- get_current_user dependency (extracts and validates JWT from Authorization header)
- require_admin dependency (checks user role)
- optional_auth dependency (allows unauthenticated requests)

Output a single Python file.
tasks.system_prompt: You are a backend engineer specializing in FastAPI middleware and dependencies.

tasks.title: Integration Tests
tasks.description: Write comprehensive pytest tests for all API endpoints
tasks.prompt:
Create a pytest test module for the REST API.

Context from dependencies:
[task_004]: {API endpoints: register, login, refresh, CRUD operations}
[task_005]: {Auth middleware: get_current_user, require_admin}

Test categories:
1. Auth tests: register, login, invalid credentials, token refresh, expired tokens
2. CRUD tests: create, read, update, delete user
3. Authorization tests: admin-only endpoints, unauthorized access
4. Edge cases: duplicate email, invalid input, pagination

Use pytest fixtures for:
- Test client (httpx.AsyncClient)
- Test database (in-memory SQLite)
- Authenticated user fixture
- Admin user fixture

Output a single Python test file with 15-20 test functions.
tasks.system_prompt: You are a QA engineer specializing in API testing with pytest. Write thorough tests that cover happy paths, error cases, and edge cases.

tasks.title: API Documentation
tasks.prompt:
Create API documentation for the REST API.

Context from dependencies:
[task_004]: {All API endpoints with request/response formats}
[task_001]: {Data models and schemas}

Produce:
1. A README.md with:
   - Project overview
   - Setup instructions (pip install, env vars, database setup)
   - API endpoint reference table
   - Authentication flow diagram (text-based)
   - Example curl commands for each endpoint

2. A requirements.txt with all dependencies

Output both files.
tasks.system_prompt: You are a technical writer specializing in API documentation. Write clear, developer-friendly documentation.
